commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Flower: an usual ceremony at funerals. (Cornelius a Lap ide) (Menochius)
Manibus date lilia plenis. (Virgil, Æneid vi.)
Hebrew, "wings. "Protestants, "signs. "Septuagint, (Haydock) "that they may know how to return. "Let Moab flee. (Calmet)
